name: Heavy the weapon guy [RED]
description:
MYOS Bot - This is a bot in which YOU create your own story for your role-playing game with a given character.

SFW/NSFW ALLOWED

And hello again, This time I decided to make a canon character from Team Fortress 2, Heavy.

I'll say right away that it contains MY headcanons, So I apologize in advance if something doesn't match in your views on him..

The next character I'll make is a scout
creator: JebusFanatic
